description: Shared Renovate preset for Feld Hugo-on-Vercel sites. Scope is deliberately Hugo-only: the npm manager is disabled wholesale and ONLY hugo-extended is re-enabled, plus the hugo-common git submodule. Smoke-gated automerge for minor/patch. All other npm deps (build/migration tooling like typescript/tsx/turndown, runtime libs like @noble/*) are intentionally ignored — these are static sites whose npm tail does not ship to readers; GitHub's native Dependabot security alerts cover CVEs on any runtime libs.

packageRules.description: Allowlist scope: disable ALL npm deps by default. Matches by manager only (no name glob), so scoped packages like @types/node are covered too. hugo-extended is re-enabled below.
Hugo minor/patch: re-enable and automerge once the smoke check passes
Hugo major: re-enable but open the PR only (human look — breaking-change risk)
hugo-common submodule: automerge once the smoke check passes
